title: prompt-validator verdict
description: Pinned typed verdict the prompt-validator subagent returns to the /template-agent Skill. Source of truth: notes/JUNIPER_ML_CUSTOM_AGENT_SUITE_DESIGN_2026-06-23.md (section 5.3) and prompts/templates/RUBRIC.md. The Skill acts on this object deterministically; the contract is enforced by tests/test_prompt_validator_contract.py.

validator_status.description: ok = bundle fresh and all checks ran; partial = some checks could not run; error = bundle stale/malformed or inputs unusable.

head_sha.description: Must equal bundle.head_sha and the current HEAD; the validator rejects a stale bundle.

iteration.description: 1-based fix-loop round this verdict belongs to (the Skill bounds the loop at 3).

findings.description: Rubric findings. Each references a stable RUBRIC.md criterion ID and carries reproducible evidence.

id.description: A stable rubric criterion ID declared in prompts/templates/RUBRIC.md (R1..R5, optional dotted child, optional sub-class letter).

severity.description: blocker and major fail the prompt; minor is a non-blocking accepted_warning.

evidence.description: Exact command + observed output backing the finding; null is permitted but auto-downgrades the finding to minor.

hallucination_risk.description: Per-claim grounding ledger for R3.4: every asserted anchor re-probed against the real repo. grounded:false fails R3.4.

class.description: R3.4 claim taxonomy: path (R3.4a), symbol (R3.4b), version (R3.4c), port/env (R3.4d), flag (R3.4e).

overall.description: PASS iff zero blocker AND zero major findings AND every hallucination_risk[].grounded is true; else FAIL.
